summary: The diff implements REQ-154 by adding `isActive` and `onActivate` props to TimeframeUploadSlot, managing `activeSlot` state in AnalyzeChart, attaching a global paste listener only when a slot is active, and clearing active state on page background click. The implementation covers nearly all acceptance criteria, but two areas are uncertain due to truncation.

missing_requirements.requirement: The active slot must display a visible focus indicator (e.g., a highlighted border or subtle glow) so the user knows which slot will receive the pasted image.
missing_requirements.reason: The TimeframeUploadSlot.tsx diff is truncated before the JSX return, so it is not possible to confirm that the isActive prop is used to apply any visible CSS highlight or glow. The prop is received but no conditional styling is visible in the available diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Selecting a file/camera image for a different slot deactivates the previous active slot.
missing_requirements.reason: The handleInputChange and camera capture handlers in the truncated TimeframeUploadSlot.tsx diff do not show any call to onActivate or a mechanism to signal AnalyzeChart to switch the active slot when a file or camera image is selected for a different slot.
